documents.text: Jane Doe serves as Chief Executive Officer and Chair of the Board of Northwind Bank. The audit committee includes John Smith and Mira Patel.
Northwind Bank reported net income of USD 2.4 billion for Q4 2025, compared with USD 2.1 billion in Q4 2024. Consumer Banking contributed USD 900 million.
The board approved a USD 5 billion share repurchase program and declared a quarterly cash dividend of USD 0.42 per common share.

questions.question: Who serves on the audit committee?
questions.ground_truth_answer: John Smith and Mira Patel serve on the audit committee.

questions.question: What net income did Northwind Bank report for Q4 2025?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Northwind Bank reported USD 2.4 billion of net income for Q4 2025.

questions.question: How is the company returning capital to shareholders?
questions.ground_truth_answer: The company is returning capital through a USD 5 billion share repurchase program and a USD 0.42 quarterly cash dividend.
